name: pi-discord-bridge
description: Discord ↔ pi Agent Bridge — Chat with pi coding agents through Discord threads

piDisplay.name: Discord ↔ pi Bridge
piDisplay.description: Talk to pi coding agents through Discord threads. Each thread gets its own isolated pi session.
piDisplay.setup:
1. Install Python deps: pip install -r requirements.txt
2. Create a Discord bot & get token
3. Edit config.json or set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
4. Run: python3 bot.py
5. Or use: bash pi-discord-manager.sh
